title: Engineering Decisions — Q1 2024
body:
Postgres: chosen for Atlas by Alice. ACID compliance required. MongoDB ruled out.
Kafka: chosen for Phoenix by Bob. RabbitMQ hit throughput limits in load test.
TypeScript: standardised across frontend. Carol led the migration from JavaScript.
author: carol

title: Atlas Project — Technical Spec
body: Owner: Alice. Stack: Postgres (primary DB), Redis (cache), Python/FastAPI (API layer), React/TypeScript (dashboard). Infra: Docker + Kubernetes managed by Bob. Status: in production as of March 2024.
author: alice

title: Orion Integration Plan
body: Orion connects the Phoenix Kafka pipeline to the Atlas Postgres database. Owner: Grace. Timeline: Q2 2024. Open question: whether to use Airflow or Prefect for orchestration. TBD.
author: grace
